newton_power_sum_equivalence.meaning: Locator-prefix equality is triangularly equivalent to equality of the first w power sums.

raw_constant_list_import_obstruction.meaning: The raw prefix map has average fiber about 2^35.735, so no constant-list RS theorem can apply to raw fibers.

rs_list_equivalence.complement_side_statement: Equivalently, after passing to D\S, it is an RS_D(k+1) list at agreement a=k+t.
rs_list_equivalence.support_side_statement: A prefix fiber is the list of h in F_p[X]_<913633 agreeing with -F_z on at least 981104 points of D.

small_signed_defect_impossibility.proof_key: Vandermonde full column rank on any support of size <= number of odd equations.

top_seam_constant_difference.conclusion: At e=w+1, the coprime side locators U and V satisfy U-V=constant.
top_seam_constant_difference.guardrail: The common core G must remain marked; unmarked side pairs can have many cores.
